mapper.sql: SELECT USER_NO, USER_ID, USER_PWD, NAME, ROLE, PHONE, EMAIL, BIRTH, ADDRESS, SEARCH_ME, GENDER, MINIMI, CREATE_DATE, ACORN, STATUS FROM MEMBER
mapper.select: SELECT MINIHOME_NO, PROFILE, INTRO, MOOD, MBTI, MINIROOM, THEME, MH_ACCESS, M.USER_NO AS M_USER_NO, USER_ID AS M_USER_ID, USER_PWD AS M_USER_PWD, NAME AS M_NAME, ROLE AS M_ROLE, PHONE AS M_PHONE, EMAIL AS M_EMAIL, BIRTH AS M_BIRTH, ADDRESS AS M_ADDRESS, SEARCH_ME AS M_SEARCH_ME, GENDER AS M_GENDER, MINIMI AS M_MINIMI, CREATE_DATE AS M_CREATE_DATE, ACORN AS M_ACORN, STATUS AS M_STATUS FROM MINIHOME H INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON (H.USER_NO = M.USER_NO) WHERE M.USER_NO = #{userNo}
